title: more turtles
description: ads five new turtles with different uses
body:
This mod will at 5 new types of turtles and also items with these turtles.
mobs : Ender tortoise : This tortoise will spawn in the end dimension and can drop chorus fruit when killed and will be cooked when killed while on fire and can also drop ender shutes. The ender tortoise will teleport randomly when hurt and is also hurt by water. ![ender tortoise](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/343/310/172/2021-04-01_20.png)
Wither tortoise : This tortoise will spawn in the nether and can drop bones and/or coal when killed and can also drop wither shutes. ![wither tortoise](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/344/310/172/2021-04-01_20.png)
Lava tortoise : This tortoise will spawn in the nether and can drop stone, coal, coal ore and lava shutes. ![lava tortoise](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/345/310/172/2021-04-01_20.png)
Skeleton turtle : this turtle will spawn in oceans and rivers and can drop bone, bone blocks and bone shutes. ![skeleton turtle](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/348/310/172/2021-04-01_20.png)
zombie turtle : This turtle will spawn in oceans and rivers and can drop rotten flesh, carrots, iron ingots and zombie shutes. zombie turtles will attack normal turtles and have a chance to convert them into zombie turtles. ![zombie turtle](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/347/310/172/2021-04-01_20.png)

Armor: ![full armor set](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/352/349/310/172/2021-04-01_21.png) Wither shell : The whither shell can be worn on your head to protect you from the wither effect.
Boneshell body : If this armor is worn you can click B to open a chest that can only hold arrows.
Zombie shell leggings : If you are burning while wearing this armor will be extinguished
Lava boots : These boots will create a sort of frost walker effect but for lava when worn.

Items :
Ender shutes : Ender shutes can be used to make ender shell boxes.
Wither shutes : Whither shutes can be used to make the wither shell.
Lava shutes : Lava shutes can be used to make the lava boots.
Bone shutes : Bone shutes can be used to make the boneshell body.
zombie shutes : Zombie shutes can be used to make the zombie shell leggings.
Ender shell boxes : Ender shell boxes are a way to store 9 stacks the sizes up to 16 in 1 inventory slot. ![ender shell box](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/352/353/ender-shell-rec.PNG)
potions: You can use the scutes of the turtles to brew potions. The ender master: With this effect you would teleport when hurt, but water would also hurt you. The lava master: With this potion you would get fire resistance, but you will still get damage when on fire until you have half a heart left. The wither master: With this effect you will give the wither effect to all nearby mobs. The zombie master: With this effect if you're hurt after you're at half health you can summon iron golem support, but also a chance of zombies. The skeleton master: With this effect you will shoot an extra arrow when pulling a bow or crossbow.

I have a discord server where you can ask questions, talk or put bug reports if you want to do it there https://discord.gg/bBj5vKGFMw. This mod has been made with Mcreator and the turtle models have been made with Blockbench.
